message:
feat(fnp-python): native fix (round toward zero) via UFuncArray::fix

Port np.fix out of the numpy passthrough pool. Falls back to np.fix for
complex/object/structured inputs + integer sidecars so numpy's coercion
surface stays exact. Round-toward-zero semantics preserved (equivalent
to ceil on negatives, floor on positives; NaN propagates; integer input
unchanged).

br-franken_numpy-hswc
